records.statement: Reading a well-formed devcontainer.json exits 0 and emits the resolved configuration as a single JSON document.
A devcontainer.json with a hard JSONC syntax error is rejected rather than silently recovered.
records.notes: deacon fails fast (constitution IV); the reference CLI recovers via a lenient JSONC parser. Backed by wvr-readconfig-malformed-jsonc.

records.statement: The remoteUser reported for an image without an explicit remoteUser is derived from the probed container user.
records.notes: Gap resolved: reference behavior characterized and case-backed by case-readconfig-remote-user (the gap-resolved fixture derived from valid/).
